seoTitle: Haymarket vs Haystack — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Haymarket and Haystack. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Haymarket and Haystack.
heading: Haymarket vs Haystack — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Haymarket, New South Wales and Haystack, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Haystack has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Haymarket (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Haymarket or Haystack safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Haymarket has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Haystack scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Haymarket scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Haystack scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Haymarket or Haystack?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Haystack has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
